intro.title: A snapshot of my background in UX engineering, front-end systems, and technical leadership
intro.description: From retail floors to Disney magic, every role shaped how I lead and build today.

experience.title: Senior Creative Developer, UX Engineering Focus
experience.description: Leading front-end and UX engineering work for high-traffic digital experiences with a focus on scalable systems, accessibility, and maintainability.
items: Lead development for high-traffic Disney sites with a strong quality and accessibility focus
Architect and maintain Aloha, a reusable Gutenberg-based platform for scalable content publishing
Partner cross-functionally to scope work, align decisions, and ship cleanly
Own code review quality, UX validation, and technical standards
Support teams through training, enablement, and documentation

experience.title: Software Engineer, Front-End / UX
experience.description: Built responsive and accessible UI for a school safety platform, with a strong emphasis on usability and clean implementation.
items: Built responsive, accessible UI components for a safety-focused web platform
Implemented forms, tagging, and user-facing flows to reduce friction
Worked in a GitLab-based team workflow and shipped with a quality-first mindset

experience.title: Creative UX Developer
experience.description: Designed and built custom sites and interactive digital experiences for clients, balancing usability, aesthetics, and practical delivery.
items: Designed and built custom sites and interactive prototypes for small businesses and creative clients
Translated design direction into responsive, cross-browser UI
Balanced client goals, timelines, and quality while owning delivery end-to-end

experience.title: Technical District Manager, Multi-Location Ops
experience.description: Led technical operations across multiple retail locations, combining hands-on problem solving, process improvement, and team leadership.
items: Led technical repair operations across multiple locations
Built training playbooks and coached store leaders and technicians
Turned underperforming locations into top performers through operational improvements
Served as escalation point for complex technical and operational issues
Drove measurable business and performance gains
